name: important-strip-isolated-views
title: Feedback css-probe state + !important floor proof
description: Re-pointed 3x (2026-06-27): CT/pref/settings/MN strips merged in #106; #118 stripped 56 feedback decls and left all 472 remaining in the keep-set, so a current-keep-set strip is a no-op (true floor is a hypothesis, not proven). Final target = the genuinely-undone harness deliverable: (D1) add the missing permanent #feedbackView state to tools/css-probe.js on the seeded multi-tone fixture, asserting a cascade-winner sentinel (REFACTOR_DONE §A0 gate + durable guard); (D2) one fresh-reset arbiter pass to MEASURE whether feedback's reachable decls are at-floor (reset only the 457 arbiter-reachable lines; preserve the 15 arbiter-unreachable carve-out incl. cross-view L24702 + :active/:disabled/.is-target), stripping only confirmed-reachable residual NOCOMP. ==472 ⇒ reproducible-within-coverage, NOT absolute floor. Commit to trial/trellis, no PR.
scope: tools/css-probe.js (+ baseline) :: #feedbackView guard; app/style.css only if D2 finds residual
creator: FlyM1ss
notes: Re-pointed 3x after git-evidence checks (CT/pref→settings→feedback-strip→feedback-probe+floor-proof); CT/pref/settings merged in #106, feedback a current-keep-set no-op. Authoritative plan = docs/REFACTOR_DONE.md §A0/§A1, NOT the frozen PHASE3.6_SPEC.md — but NOTE the on-disk REFACTOR_DONE.md is the PRE-RECONCILE copy: f4433ec is a sibling of HEAD off #118, NOT checked out on trial/trellis; read the on-branch file (it titles #feedbackView the '(next target)' strip, does not declare it at-floor) or merge f4433ec before quoting. Reference method = PR #106 (6593c19) + #118 (2d7a757) arbiter loop. Plan review-hardened 2x (page.route fixture, 15-decl carve-out, winner-sentinel D1, reproducible-within-coverage D2). Complex task; design.md + implement.md present. Seeded by the Trellis trial.
